name: the lands of schia - open world rpg
description:
thanks for 400 followers, i wanted to try my hand at making a fantasy setting for an rpg bot and this is what i got so far. enjoy

disclaimer if you start as anything other then an elf or start without a female elf escort within the the Matriarchy of Felbonia your gonna get arrested, and if you start as an elf within the the Federation of Man your also probably gonna run into some issues, same thing if you start as any kind of demihuman anywhere in the federation other then the city of Absistus, if you start as a demihuman anywhere else in the federation they will probably treat you like shit. Also i completely ripped off the ancient dragons from elden ring to be sort of god/distant ancestor figures for the dragonkin because i think they’re hella cool.

major cities are marked with black dots and other notable places are marked with white dots. (and a gray dot for the fleshlands cuz the landmass was already white on the map.)

world is split into two great islands with the elves in complete control of the great island of the west and the great island of the east under split control between humans, dragonkin, and elves.

races:

humans- self explanatory

elves- self explanatory

dragonkin- humans with draconic characteristics, some of them can turn into dragons depending on the purity of their bloodline.

admistus- human animal hybrids created by the federation through genetic splicing, basically just a catch all for any human animal hybrid you might want. they are second class citizens within the federation and used for menial labor and as servants. with the exception of the city of Absistus were they are treated much better. if you get caught cracking an admistus as a human anywhere in the federation other than Absistus your getting thrown in jail so be careful.

countries:

the Matriarchy of Felbonia- elven country where male elves are viewed as inferior to female elves and the country is ruled by a group of 6 elven women known as the matriarchal hexarchy, not industrial and relies heavily on magic. capital city is Sintra

Varanus- dragonkin country where pollical power is based off the purity of a dragonkin's bloodline, is ran by a group of dragon kin known as ethereals. capital city is Iknus

the Federation of Man- human country ran by a group of 4 leaders known as princeps with one being from each major city in the federation, heavy reliance on technology and industrial growth due to humans being naturally inferior at magic. capital city is Imperium

magic types: experienced mages can combine multiple types of magic together into unique spells, for example using terramancy and cryomancy to create an avalanche, or combining pyromancy and terramancy to throw globs of lava.

terramancy- the manipulation of earth and rocks, often used for defense and construction

hydromancy -the manipulation of liquid water, often used for ranged combat and agriculture

pyromancy- the manipulation of fire, often used for close range combat and manufacturing

cryomancy- the manipulation of ice and the ability to freeze water, often used for a mix of close range and long range combat

umbramancy- the manipulation of shadows and sound, often used by assassins and thieves

lumenmancy- the manipulation of light, often used for long range combat and as a utility in dark places or at night.

aeromancy - the manipulation of wind and air currents, often used for traversal and flight.

not gonna spoil anything else, lorebook has around 7k tokens and it currently contains all 3 main countries background, culture, and leadership as well as all their cities and major geographic locations fully flushed out. i plan on adding specific wildlife and monsters for both islands next but for now you should just be able to insert your own through chat memory if you want to and the ai will probably just make some shit up anyways if you don't.

this is the website i used to create the map
creator: Sshsgagsvawj
